decomposition.event_scalar: per-anchor valid-domain mean departure from climatology
decomposition.event_spatial_anomaly: per-anchor residual after removing climatology and the event scalar; zero mean over the valid domain

spatial_anomaly_gate.question: Do event-specific spatial PWV anomalies add skill beyond static geography plus the event-level scalar moisture regime?

interpretation: Every PWV variant uses the same long-PWV checkpoint and frozen calibration thresholds. No model is retrained.
